name: Spicy Lamb Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Boneless lamb shoulder, cut into 3/4- to 1-inch pieces
15-ounce can pinquitos or pinto beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Season lamb with salt and pepper.
2. Coat lamb with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
4. Add half of the lamb and sauté until brown, about 8 minutes.
5. Transfer the browned lamb to a bowl.
6. Repeat with remaining lamb, scraping up any browned bits.
7. Reduce heat to low.
8. Add shallots and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes.
9. Return lamb and juices to the pan.
10. Mix in both paprikas, cumin, broth, coffee, and sugar.
11. Bring chili to a boil, scraping up browned bits.
12. Reduce heat to low.
13. Cover and simmer until lamb is tender, about 50 minutes.
14. Add beans; simmer uncovered until chili thickens, about 5 minutes.
15. Serve hot.
